verdicts.verdict_greek: καὶ ἐκάλεσεν τὸν ἄγγελον καὶ εἶπεν αὐτῷ Λάβε τὸ ἥμισυ πάντων ὧν ἐνηνόχατε.
verdicts.reasoning: In the main B-text line on the scan, the word is clearly printed ἥμισυ, not the OCR’s split and misread ἥμυсу/ἥμυσυ form.

verdicts.verdict_greek: καὶ ἐκάλεσεν τὸν ἄγγελον καὶ εἶπεν αὐτῷ Λάβε τὸ ἥμισυ πάντων ὧν
verdicts.reasoning: On the Swete scan the line clearly reads Λάβε τὸ ἥμισυ, not A’s ἥμυσυ, and the verse is cut off at the page break after ὧν; Cambridge/Tischendorf likewise support ἥμισυ here.

notes: Tobit page prints B-text above and S-text below; adjudication uses the upper B-text only. Verse 12:5 is split by the page break, so only the visible portion on scan p. 857 is adjudicated.
